createAccount.heading: Sign up for Stream
createAccount.backButtonLabel: Already have an account? Log in
createAccount.successToast: Your account has been created successfully. Please verify your email to complete registration.
createAccount.errorToast: Registration failed. Please try again or contact support.
createAccount.successDescription: A confirmation email has been sent. Please check your inbox and follow the instructions.
createAccount.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Log in

verify.heading: Verify Your Account
verify.description: A verification email has been sent to your email address. Please check your inbox and click the link to verify your account.
verify.errorMessage: Please try again later or contact support.

login.heading: Log in to TeaStream
login.backButtonLabel: Don't have an account? Sign up!
login.pinDescription: Enter the code from your app for authentication.
login.loginDescription: Your name or email that you entered during registration.

resetPassword.heading: Reset Password
resetPassword.backButtonLabel: Already have an account? Log in
resetPassword.emailDescription: Your email address used during registration.
resetPassword.successAlertDescription: We sent a password reset link to your email. If Telegram notifications are enabled, the link has also been sent there.

newPassword.heading: New Password
newPassword.backButtonLabel: Already have an account? Log in
newPassword.passwordRepeatDescription: Repeat your new password for confirmation.

deactivate.heading: Account Deactivation
deactivate.pinDescription: A code has been sent to your email. If Telegram notifications are enabled, the code has also been sent there.
deactivate.emailDescription: Your email address used during registration.
deactivate.successMessage: You have successfully deactivated your account

header.heading: Settings
header.description: Here you can manage your settings

header.heading: Profile
header.description: Customize your profile, update your avatar, change information about yourself, and add links to social networks to make your page more attractive to other users.

avatar.heading: Profile Image

confirmModal.heading: Delete Avatar
confirmModal.message: Are you sure you want to delete the profile image? This action cannot be undone.

avatar.info: Supported formats: JPG, JPEG, PNG or GIF. Maximum size: 10 MB.

info.heading: Profile settings
info.usernameDescription: Other users will know you by this name.
info.displayNameDescription: You can capitalize the username however you like.
info.bioDescription: Your bio must be 300 characters or fewer.

createForm.heading: Social media links
createForm.urlDescription: Where does this link lead? Enter the full URL, for example https://github.com/

editForm.urlDescription: Where does this link lead? Enter the full URL, for example https://github.com/

socialLinks.errorReorderMessage: Error changing social network links order

header.heading: Account
header.description: Manage your account settings, including access changes, security, and the ability to deactivate.
header.securityDescription: Set up two-factor authentication for enhanced protection of your data.
header.deactivationDescription: If you want to temporarily or permanently disable your account, use this option. Please note the consequences.

email.heading: Email address
email.emailDescription: Enter your new email address. Make sure it is valid, as a confirmation will be sent to it.

password.heading: Account password
password.oldPasswordDescription: Enter your old password to verify your identity before changing your password. This is required to ensure your account security.
password.newPasswordDescription: Your new password must be at least 8 characters. It is recommended to also use special characters for better security.

twoFactor.heading: TOTP Authentication
twoFactor.description: Increase your account security by enabling TOTP authentication. This additional layer of protection requires entering a unique code, making your account less vulnerable to unauthorized access.

enable.heading: Enable TOTP
enable.qrInstructions: Scan the QR code to add TOTP
enable.pinDescription: Please enter the 6-digit code provided by your authentication app.

disable.heading: Do you really want to disable TOTP?
disable.message: By disabling TOTP authentication, your account will be less secure. Are you sure you want to continue?

deactivation.heading: Account deactivation
deactivation.description: After deactivating your account, you will not be able to log in. After 7 days, the account will be permanently deleted. Before that, you can contact support to restore access and unlock your account.

confirmModal.heading: Confirm deactivation
confirmModal.message: Are you sure you want to deactivate your account? Access can only be restored within 7 days.

header.heading: Appearance
header.description: Customize the appearance of the site interface to your liking. Choose a theme and language that will make your interaction more comfortable.

theme.heading: Change theme
theme.description: You can choose a dark or light theme for the site interface

language.heading: Change language
language.description: You can choose the language of the site interface

color.heading: Change color
color.description: You can choose a color for the site interface

header.heading: Notifications
header.description: Configure how you want to receive notifications from TeaStream. You will receive notifications about the start of broadcasts on channels you are subscribed to, as well as about new subscribers.

siteNotifications.heading: Site notifications
siteNotifications.description: If you turn off site notifications, you will not receive notifications about new subscribers to your channel or about new broadcasts.

telegramNotifications.heading: Telegram notifications
telegramNotifications.description: If you enable Telegram notifications, your TeaStream account will be linked to your Telegram account, and you will receive messages about new subscriptions, new streams, password resets, and two-factor authentication codes.

header.heading: Sessions
header.description: Sessions are devices that you use or have used to log into your TeaStream account. Active sessions at the moment are shown here.

confirmModal.heading: Delete session
confirmModal.message: Are you sure you want to delete this session? This action will permanently delete the session on this device and end all active activity associated with it.

header.heading: Stream keys
header.description: Generate a URL and key to conduct a broadcast.

instructionModal.heading: 🛠 OBS setup guide for live broadcasts 🛠
instructionModal.description: To start sharing your content with your audience, follow the detailed guide for connecting OBS Studio. Just a few steps and you're ready to go live!
instructionModal.step1Title: 🔑 Step 1: Download OBS Studio and generate Server URL and Stream Key
instructionModal.step1Description: To start streaming, you need two important elements: Server URL and Stream Key. Follow these steps:
instructionModal.downloadObsDescription: Before setting up your stream, download and install the program
instructionModal.copyKeys: Copy Server URL and Stream Key
instructionModal.copyKeysDescription: After generation, two fields will appear on screen: Server URL and Stream Key. Click the copy icons next to each field to save the data to your clipboard.
instructionModal.step2Description: Now that you have the required data, let's set up OBS to work with your stream:
instructionModal.openObsDescription: If you don't have OBS installed yet, download it from the official website and install it. After launching, the OBS home page will open.
instructionModal.openStreamSettingsDescription: In the top menu, click "File" -> "Settings". Go to the "Stream" tab.
instructionModal.enterDetailsDescription: In the "Service" field, select "Custom...". Paste the copied Server URL into the "Server" field. Paste your Stream Key into the "Stream Key" field.
instructionModal.saveSettingsDescription: Click "Apply", then "OK" to save your changes.
instructionModal.step3Description: After successfully configuring OBS, you're ready to start your live broadcast:
instructionModal.startStreamDescription: Return to the OBS main screen and click the "Start Streaming" button.
instructionModal.monitorStreamDescription: Your stream will start in real time, and you can watch it on both the platform and in OBS.
instructionModal.congrats: ✨ Congratulations! You have successfully set up OBS for streaming on our platform. Your audience is waiting for new exciting moments and content! 🎉

createModal.heading: Generate keys
createModal.ingressTypeDescription: Select RTMP for classic broadcasting or WHIP for WebRTC connections.

header.heading: Chat settings
header.description: Here you can manage your chat settings.

isChatEnabled.heading: Enable chat
isChatEnabled.description: If you enable chat, viewers will be able to write messages in the chat during your broadcast.

isChatFollowersOnly.heading: Followers-only chat
isChatFollowersOnly.description: If you enable this setting, only your followers will be able to write messages in the chat.

isChatPremiumFollowersOnly.heading: Premium followers-only chat
isChatPremiumFollowersOnly.description: If you enable this setting, only premium followers will be able to write messages in the chat.

header.heading: Followers
header.description: Here is a list of all your followers.

header.heading: Sponsors
header.description: A list of all your sponsors is displayed here.

header.heading: Premium plans
header.description: This displays a list of premium plans for your channel.

alert.heading: Channel verification required
alert.description: To create premium plans, your channel must be verified. You only need 10 subscribers to get a checkmark and unlock access to this feature.

createForm.heading: Create plan
createForm.titleDescription: Enter the name of your plan. This name will be displayed to your subscribers.
createForm.descriptionDescription: Describe what your plan includes. This will help your subscribers understand the benefits of the subscription.
createForm.priceDescription: Enter the plan price in US dollars. This is the amount users will pay for the subscription.

header.heading: Transactions
header.description: This displays transactions related to channel sponsorships.
